load_bearing_assumptions: Protocol descriptions do not directly state observer matrices; they are encoded from a finite candidate family.
protocol A is encoded as direct observation of x1 and x2
protocol B is encoded as an aggregate x1+x3 panel with x2
assembly_audit.theorem_layer: assembled evidence-to-problem encoding; exact only where extraction_mode is exact_extraction
falsification_route: supply an explicit observer matrix or remove a conflicting authoritative item
mark any modelling choice as encoded_inference instead of exact_extraction if it is not directly stated
ambiguity_collapse_route: add an exact source item that distinguishes between the remaining observer hypotheses
promote only one observer hypothesis per protocol into authoritative downstream use
notes: observer hypotheses were promoted into ProblemSpec observers only after explicit selection

load_bearing_assumptions: observer hypothesis 'protocol_a_direct' encodes protocol 'protocol_a' via features ['measure_x1', 'measure_x2']
observer hypothesis 'protocol_a_sum13' encodes protocol 'protocol_a' via features ['aggregate_x1_x3', 'measure_x2']
protocol_a.theorem_layer: finite-family evidence suggestion; not a theorem-grade descent conclusion
falsification_route: supply an explicit observer matrix from the source and bypass finite-family suggestion
add protocol facts that distinguish between the tied candidate hypotheses
ambiguity_collapse_route: record one more exact protocol fact that only one candidate family satisfies
notes: candidate ranking is deterministic and finite-family only

load_bearing_assumptions: observer hypothesis 'protocol_b_sum13' encodes protocol 'protocol_b' via features ['aggregate_x1_x3', 'measure_x2']
observer hypothesis 'protocol_b_direct' encodes protocol 'protocol_b' via features ['measure_x1', 'measure_x2']
protocol_b.theorem_layer: finite-family evidence suggestion; not a theorem-grade descent conclusion
falsification_route: supply an explicit observer matrix from the source and bypass finite-family suggestion
add protocol facts that distinguish between the tied candidate hypotheses
ambiguity_collapse_route: record one more exact protocol fact that only one candidate family satisfies
notes: candidate ranking is deterministic and finite-family only

refinement_falsification_route: Add a candidate observer with a strictly smaller audited score.
Show that the reported winner does not factor every target observer.
